request_payload.exposure_text: Just saw this report about how our European allies are cutting back on defense spending while expecting us to cover their security. It's not fair to keep bearing the burden alone. We need to push for real strategic autonomy—meaning we invest in our own defenses so we're not held hostage by unreliable partners. #NationalSecurityFirst
